category_sources: source_facts.description identifies the classic cowsay project fork; official GitHub README describes Cowsay as a configurable talking cow in the spirit of silliness.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cowsay; official README calls the program and project "Cowsay".
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and covers installation, project status, history, and usage context.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/cowsay-org/cowsay; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists cowsay and cowthink; official README says Cowsay is a configurable talking cow written in Perl.
